title: Why Endava Stock Plummeted This Week
author: Keith Noonan
description: Endava experienced a significant stock decline of 29.5% after reporting Q1 fiscal 2026 results that missed previous guidance, with sales declining 8.7% year-over-year and management lowering annual performance targets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company reported unexpected sales decline of 8.7%, missed earnings guidance, lowered annual sales forecast, and failed to demonstrate progress in AI strategies, leading to significant stock price drop

title: Why Endava Stock Was Tanking on Tuesday
author: Eric Volkman
description: Endava reported disappointing Q1 fiscal 2026 results, with revenue of 178 million pounds, down 9% year-over-year, and missed analyst expectations. The stock dropped over 26% due to unexpected client credits and strategic pipeline opportunities not converting to revenue.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Missed revenue and earnings estimates, experienced significant stock price drop, and provided conservative fiscal year guidance below previous year's performance

title: Endava: Trends Moving in Wrong Direction
author: Lou Whiteman
description: Endava reported a disappointing fourth quarter with declining revenue, reduced headcount, and a shrinking client base. The company's stock has dropped significantly, with management attributing challenges to macro economic conditions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock down 52% year-to-date, revenue declined 4% year-over-year, reduced client base, lower earnings guidance, and decreased headcount indicate significant business challenges

title: US Stock Futures Trade Higher On Wednesday: S&P 500 Is Flashing 'Quite Rare And Rather Bullish' Signal, Says Expert (UPDATED)
author: Rishabh Mishra
description: US stock futures traded higher on Wednesday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 indices turning positive for the year. Analysts noted a bullish signal in the market, with over 60% of S&P 500 components reaching new 20-day highs, which has historically been followed by strong performance.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company reported preliminary Q1 results and withdrew its full-year guidance, causing a 14.47% drop in its premarket trading.
The company reported a quarterly loss and revenue miss during the first quarter, leading to a 16.25% drop in its stock price.
The company is expected to report quarterly earnings, with analysts expecting an increase in earnings per share compared to the year-ago period.

The company is expected to report quarterly earnings, with analysts expecting the earnings per share to remain unchanged compared to the year-ago period, leading to a 1.78% increase in its premarket trading.
The company's stock continued its momentum after reports of potential deals with the United Arab Emirates and Saudi Arabia, leading to a 1.90% increase in its premarket trading.
The company reported a 19% year-over-year increase in its first-quarter revenue, driven by new product launches, leading to a 48.99% jump in its stock price.
